description: MODULE 07 — Memory Fabric: Schema definitions for vector memory storage, agent memory management, semantic search, vector operations, retention policies, and error handling.

MemoryVector.description: A semantic memory vector storing embedded content associated with a tenant, document, and embedding type.

id.description: Unique identifier for this memory vector.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier this memory vector belongs to.

embedding_type.description: Classification of the memory vector by scope and lifetime.

semantic_content.description: The textual content of the memory vector.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with this vector.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this memory vector was created.

embedding_model.description: Name or version of the embedding model used to produce the semantic vector.

chunk_id.description: Identifier for the source document chunk.

segment_type.description: Semantic category of this memory segment.

embedding_vector.description: Numerical embedding vector representing the semantic content.

vector_hash.description: Hash of the embedding vector for integrity verification.

ttl.description: Time-to-live expiry timestamp; null means no expiry.

AgentMemory.description: An agent's aggregate memory state, including personal memories and an ephemeral context window.

personal_memories.description: Array of UUIDs referencing the agent's persistent personal memory vectors.

ephemeral_window.description: Configuration for the agent's temporary/contextual memory window.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last update to this agent's memory state.

status.description: Current operational status of this agent's memory.

EphemeralWindow.description: Parameters governing an agent's ephemeral (short-lived) memory window.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the ephemeral window.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds for entries in the ephemeral window.

SemanticSearchRequest.description: A request to perform semantic search over memory vectors.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier to scope the search.

embedding_type.description: Scope of memory vectors to search.

top_n.description: Maximum number of results to return.

relevance_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score threshold for results.

vector_ids.description: Optional list of vector UUIDs to limit the search scope.

filters.description: Additional metadata filters to apply to the search.

include_context.description: Whether to include contextual metadata in the search results.

SearchResult.description: A single result returned from a semantic search operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this search result entry.

vector_id.description: UUID of the matching memory vector.

metadata.description: Associated metadata from the memory vector.

source_type.description: Category of the source document or memory.

section_id.description: UUID of the specific section within the source document.

rank.description: Ranking position of this result within the search response (1-based).

embedding_model.description: The embedding model used for the matched vector.

VectorOperation.description: A record of a vector store operation such as ingest, search, update, or delete.

operation_type.description: Type of vector store operation performed.

batch_size.description: Number of items in this operation batch.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the operation completed or failed.

error_message.description: Error message if the operation failed; null otherwise.

MemoryRetentionPolicy.description: Configuration for how long memory vectors of a given type are retained before garbage collection.

id.description: Unique identifier for this retention policy.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier this policy applies to.

memory_type.description: Type of memory this retention policy governs.

max_age_days.description: Maximum number of days before a memory of this type is eligible for deletion.

max_memory_count.description: Maximum number of memories of this type allowed per tenant.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds for individual memory entries.

auto_gc_enabled.description: Whether automatic garbage collection is enabled for this policy.

creation_date.description: Timestamp when this retention policy was created.

ErrorResponse.description: A standardized error response for Memory Fabric API operations.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
